message:
feat: Integrate headshot image and enhance hero section UX

Adds professional headshot with polished visual effects and removes
unnecessary explanatory text for cleaner presentation.

Headshot integration (public/jeff_emanuel_headshot.jpg):
- Professional headshot image (2007×2795px, 712KB JPEG)
- High-quality portrait for personal branding
- Will be optimized by Next.js Image component

Visual enhancements (components/hero.tsx):
- Add animated headshot with spring physics entrance
- Position headshot next to eyebrow badge in horizontal layout
- Implement enhanced blur glow effect:
  - Increased opacity (20% → 30% for 50% brighter)
  - Increased blur radius (xl → 2xl for softer glow)
  - Extended coverage (-inset-2 for better visibility)
- Add glass-morphic circular frame with:
  - 2px slate border with 60% opacity
  - Dark background (slate-900/80)
  - Ring accent (sky-500/20)
  - Large shadow (shadow-slate-950/70)

Responsive image sizing:
- Use Next.js Image fill mode for better optimization
- Sizes: "(max-width: 639px) 80px, 96px"
- Mobile: 80px × 80px (h-20 w-20)
- Desktop: 96px × 96px (sm:h-24 sm:w-24)
- Increased from previous 64px/80px for better visibility
- Object-fit: cover with center positioning
- Priority loading for LCP optimization

Content cleanup:
- Remove "Live surface" heading
- Remove "Agents • Markets • Infrastructure" subheading
- Remove "Online" status badge
- Remove explanation paragraph about "structured orbits"
- Remove "Based in [location]" text
- Keep Three.js visualization without explanatory text
- Simpler, cleaner presentation

Error boundary integration:
- Wrap ThreeScene in ErrorBoundary component
- Add Suspense with ThreeSceneLoading fallback
- Graceful degradation if visualization fails

Layout improvements:
- Better visual hierarchy with headshot
- More professional first impression
- Cleaner, less cluttered design
- Maintains responsive behavior (lg:flex-row)

Technical details:
- Fixed responsive sizing (639px breakpoint matches Tailwind sm:)
- Proper Next.js Image optimization with sizes attribute
- Animated entrance with Framer Motion
- Accessible alt text using siteConfig.name

Impact:
- More professional and personal presentation
- Better mobile visibility (80px vs 64px)
- Enhanced visual appeal with glow effects
- Reduced cognitive load (less text to read)
- Faster perceived load (priority image)
- Better SEO (proper image alt text)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
